mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.project_id AS projectId, d.title, d.description, d.document_type AS documentType, d.status, d.create_by AS createBy, d.create_time AS createTime, d.update_time AS updateTime,
-- 附件字段（取第一个附件） a.file_path AS url, a.file_name AS fileName, a.file_size AS fileSize, a.mime_type AS mimeType
FROM document d LEFT JOIN attachment a ON a.source_type = 'document' AND a.source_id = d.id AND a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.id IN (SELECT MIN(id) FROM attachment WHERE source_type = 'document' AND source_id = d.id AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY source_id)
d.is_deleted = 0
AND (d.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND d.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND d.project_id = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
